name: Pipeline B - Onboarding to Agent v2

parameters.jsCode:
const { execSync } = require('child_process');
const transcriptPath = $input.first().json.body.transcript_path;
const pyScript = [
  'import sys, json',
  'sys.path.insert(0, "/data")',
  'from scripts.parse_transcript import parse_transcript',
  'from scripts.extract_memo import extract_account_memo',
  'from scripts.utils.storage import load_account_memo',
  '',
  'transcript = parse_transcript("' + transcriptPath + '")',
  'account_id = transcript["account_id"]',
  '',
  'v1_memo = load_account_memo(account_id, "v1")',
  'has_v1 = v1_memo is not None',
  '',
  'print(json.dumps({',
  '    "account_id": account_id,',
  '    "company_name": transcript["company_name"],',
  '    "has_v1": has_v1,',
  '    "transcript_path": "' + transcriptPath + '"',
  '}))',
].join('\n');
const stdout = execSync('cd /data && python -c \'' + pyScript + '\'', { encoding: 'utf-8' });
return [{json: { stdout: stdout.trim() }}];

nodes.name: Load v1 Memo & Validate
nodes.notes: Loads existing v1 memo for this account. Fails gracefully if v1 doesn't exist.

parameters.jsCode:
const { execSync } = require('child_process');
const transcriptPath = $input.first().json.body.transcript_path;
const pyScript = [
  'import sys, json, os',
  'sys.path.insert(0, "/data")',
  'from scripts.parse_transcript import parse_transcript',
  'from scripts.update_from_onboarding import update_from_onboarding',
  'from scripts.generate_agent_spec import generate_agent_spec',
  'from scripts.generate_changelog import generate_changelog, generate_changes_json',
  'from scripts.utils.storage import (',
  '    load_account_memo, save_account_memo, save_agent_spec,',
  '    save_changelog, save_json, DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR',
  ')',
  '',
  'transcript_path = "' + transcriptPath + '"',
  'transcript = parse_transcript(transcript_path)',
  'account_id = transcript["account_id"]',
  'company = transcript["company_name"]',
  '',
  'v1_memo = load_account_memo(account_id, "v1")',
  'if not v1_memo:',
  '    print(json.dumps({"error": "No v1 memo found", "account_id": account_id}))',
  '    sys.exit(1)',
  '',
  'v2_memo, changes = update_from_onboarding(v1_memo, transcript)',
  'memo_path = save_account_memo(account_id, v2_memo, "v2")',
  '',
  'v2_spec = generate_agent_spec(v2_memo, "v2")',
  'spec_path = save_agent_spec(account_id, v2_spec, "v2")',
  '',
  'changelog_md = generate_changelog(account_id, company, changes)',
  'cl_path = save_changelog(account_id, changelog_md)',
  '',
  'changes_json = generate_changes_json(account_id, company, changes)',
  'changes_path = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "accounts", account_id, "changes.json")',
  'save_json(changes_json, changes_path)',
  '',
  'print(json.dumps({',
  '    "account_id": account_id,',
  '    "company_name": company,',
  '    "memo_path": memo_path,',
  '    "spec_path": spec_path,',
  '    "changelog_path": cl_path,',
  '    "total_changes": len(changes),',
  '    "status": "success"',
  '}))',
].join('\n');
const stdout = execSync('cd /data && python -c \'' + pyScript + '\'', { encoding: 'utf-8' });
return [{json: { stdout: stdout.trim() }}];

nodes.name: Apply Onboarding Updates
nodes.notes: Extracts onboarding data, computes diff, merges with v1, generates v2 + changelog
